name: height-weight-field
title: Height & Weight Field
description: Height/weight entry with metric/imperial toggle and a live BMI gauge; emits canonical kg/cm.

props.name: defaultValue
props.type: { heightCm: number | null; weightKg: number | null }
props.description: Initial value in canonical units (cm, kg).

props.name: onValueChange
props.description: Fires with canonical kg/cm regardless of the display unit.

props.name: showGauge
props.description: Show the live BmiGauge; hide for paediatric/pregnancy callers.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables the inputs and unit toggle.

clinicalNotes: BMI is a screening band, not a diagnosis (as BmiGauge itself states) — the field surfaces the number and band but never hard-blocks on either. Switching units converts the entered values rather than clearing them, and the emitted value is always canonical (cm, kg) so downstream storage is unit-stable. Paediatric and pregnancy callers should hide the gauge, where adult BMI bands do not apply.
notes: Round-2 form component; composes bmi-gauge + field + input + toggle-group. Display strings are local so decimal entry survives; the emitted value is canonical.
